page.readyBody: You visited on {date}. Your review is anonymous — only your first name is shown.
page.alreadyReviewedBody: You've already left a review for this reservation. Thank you once again!
page.ineligibleBody: This reservation was cancelled or marked as a no-show, so it is not eligible for a review.
page.notFoundBody: This review link was not recognised. It may be misspelled — try copying it again from the email.
page.configMissingBody: Tavli is still being set up. Please try again later or contact support.

form.aggregateLabel: Include my review in the restaurant's public average rating. Your review appears regardless; tick this only if you want it to count towards the displayed average.
form.errorNoRating: Please select a star rating first.
form.errorGeneric: Your review could not be saved.
form.doneTitle: Thank you — your review has been saved.
form.doneBody: Verified diners help others choose better.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.visitNotYet: You can leave a review after your visit.
errors.windowExpired: The window for leaving a review has expired.
errors.editWindowExpired: The edit window (14 days) has expired.
errors.editHidden: The review has been hidden and can no longer be edited.
errors.editFailed: The review could not be edited.
